title: Axiometa Studio
description: Axiometa Studio (also called Genesis Studio) is the prompt-to-firmware web IDE included with the Genesis Mini Starter Kit. Describe a project in natural language and it generates Arduino-oriented firmware (and optional dashboard UI) for the ESP32-S3 Genesis Mini and AX22 modules. Site tagline: "From prompt to device." It pairs modular AX22 hardware (sensors, LEDs, motors — no soldering) with firmware generation. Not a hardware SKU; storefront kit "Learn More" for Studio points here.
technical_details: Generates Arduino-oriented firmware, optional dashboard UI
Works with AX22 modular hardware (sensors, LEDs, motors, etc.)
Included with the Genesis Mini Starter Kit (full access listed in kit contents)
Community project gallery available in the Studio UI (not scraped)
notes: Web IDE / firmware generation environment included with the starter kit.
Storefront 'Learn More' points here; not a hardware SKU.
No STEP/GLB/schematic assets — software entry only.
